svg.title: Packet journey — No VPN vs wgeasy vs Tailscale
svg.desc: Packet travel comparison showing how VPN prevents ISP throttling
svg.text: wgeasy on VPS — Telus sees WireGuard only
Tailscale exit node — same result + Zero Trust identity layer
wgeasy vs Tailscale — what's actually different
any device you own becomes exit
Entra ID SSO — identity controls access
Your ISP is the road — not a destination. All packets travel THROUGH them.
Encrypt the packets → ISP sees gibberish → cannot throttle what it cannot identify.
